originalTitle: Could a $25,000 Investment in Nvidia Stock Make You a Millionaire?
summary: If you had invested that much in the chipmaker 10 years ago and held on, your stake would be worth more than $4 million today.
content: If you had invested that much in the chipmaker 10 years ago and held on, your stake would be worth more than $4 million today.
chineseTitle: 投资 25,000 美元的 Nvidia 股票能让你成为百万富翁吗？
chineseSummary: 如果您 10 年前向这家芯片制造商投资了这么多资金并持有，那么您的股份如今价值将超过 400 万美元。
chineseContent: 如果您 10 年前向这家芯片制造商投资了这么多资金并持有，那么您的股份如今价值将超过 400 万美元。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
